name.ja: <ruby>天<rt>てん</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt>か</rt></ruby><ruby>独<rt>どっ</rt></ruby><ruby>歩<rt>ぽ</rt></ruby>の<ruby>大<rt>だい</rt></ruby><ruby>義<rt>ぎ</rt></ruby><ruby>賊<rt>ぞく</rt></ruby>

text.en: If you control no monsters, you can Tribute Summon this card face-up by Tributing monsters from your hand and/or your opponent's field. You can only use each of the following effects of "The World's Greatest Gallant Thief" once per turn. When your opponent activates a card effect in the hand, GY, or banishment, while you control this Normal Summoned/Set card (Quick Effect): You can negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that card. During the Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can reveal your entire hand; change all monsters your opponent controls to Defense Position.
text.zh-CN: 自己场上不存在怪兽的情况下，此卡可通过从自己手牌及对手场上之中将怪兽解放来以表侧表示上级召唤。此卡名的①②效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：此卡是被通常召唤的情况下，对手发动手牌・墓地・除外状态的卡的效果时可以发动。将该效果无效并破坏。②：在自己・对手的战斗阶段，向对手出示所有手牌可以发动。将对手场上的怪兽全部改成守备表示。
